name: Watermelon Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Graham Cracker Crust: Mix 24 Graham cracker squares, 1/4 lb butter or margarine, 1/4 cup sugar, and 1 teaspoon cinnamon. Pack the mixture into a ten-inch pie pan for an even layer.
2. Puree the watermelon until it measures 2 cups. Add powdered sugar and set aside.
3. Soften 2 tablespoons of unflavored gelatin in cold water. Pour boiling water over the gelatin, stir to dissolve, then add lemon juice and pureed watermelon. Refrigerate until the mixture begins to thicken slightly.
4. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites and whipped cream into the chilled mixture.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell and refrigerate until firm.
6. Garnish with additional whipped cream before serving. This recipe yields one 10-inch pie or two 8-inch pies.
